blocks.content: Configure how often Grafana checks your rule and how long the condition must persist before the alert fires.

blocks.title: Configure evaluation group and pending period

blocks.content: Create a new evaluation group. Click **New evaluation group**, enter a name and interval, then click **Create**.
Set the **Pending period** to **5m**. The condition must persist for 5 minutes of consecutive checks before the alert fires. This prevents notifications from temporary spikes.
Your evaluation timing is configured. Next, you'll choose how the rule handles missing data or query failures.
